name: Tiki Soul
name_jp: ソウル・オブ・スタチュー
desc: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Rock/LIGHT/Level 4/ATK 1000/DEF 1800) (this card is also still a Trap). While this card is an Effect Monster, if another Trap Card you control that is a monster would be destroyed by your opponent's card and sent to your GY, you can Set it in the Spell & Trap Zone instead.
eff: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Rock/LIGHT/Level 4/ATK 1000/DEF 1800) (this card is also still a Trap). While this card is an Effect Monster, if another Trap Card you control that is a monster would be destroyed by your opponent's card and sent to your GY, you can Set it in the Spell & Trap Zone instead.

sets.set: Battle Pack 2: War of the Giants

action: Places destroyed cards in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Sets face-up cards in your Spell & Trap Zone
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
